rationale: Purely descriptive write-up of a Japan-exclusive product drop timed to a lucky calendar day, no evaluative verdict.
Brand-originated fragrance/makeup launch announcement with ambassador face; press-kit derived, not public opinion.
Gucci's prior exit from Seoul duty-free cited as part of a structural luxury-distribution retreat in Korea.
Quantified Q1 2026 revenue decline (-8% YoY, Japan -14%) despite leadership overhaul; negative earnings/momentum press.
Retrospective detailing severe 2025 revenue/profit/brand-value collapse and loss of creative identity, still recirculating.
Price hikes on handbags alongside a shift to lower-friction gifting/commerce channels read as chasing volume amid soft demand.
Ambassador magazine-cover styling coverage, brand-adjacent activation buzz rather than independent sentiment.
Recirculated fan repost volume around ambassador show appearance; fandom spike explicitly flagged, damped per rubric.
Analysis frames Japan's relative strength as fragile and currency-dependent rather than genuine brand health.
